docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GLASSENBERG, JEREMY AS TO DEFENDANT DETECON, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLASSENBERG, JEREMY AS TO DEFENDANT DETECON, INC
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM CT CORPORATION RE: DEFENDANT NOT LISTED IN CT CORP RECORDS - UNABLE TO FORWARD AS TO DEFENDANT DETECON, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-19-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JEREMY GLASSENBERG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DETECON, INC IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF SC-100 ON 4/11/22 (SERVICE FEE $55) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLASSENBERG, JEREMY AS TO DEFENDANT DETECON, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JEREMY GLASSENBERG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DETECON, INC., REPRESENTED BY JANE BOEHM, HR & OPERATIONS MANAGER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE: CT CORPORATION); SEE SIGNATURE ON CARD SERVED MAR-03-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DETECON, INC
STIPUALTION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER -COPY MAILED TO DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLASSENBERG, JEREMY
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JANE BOEHM, HR & OPERATIONS MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT DETECON, INC
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLASSENBERG, JEREMY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DETECON, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT REQUESTED BY PLANTIFF **DENIED**
